---
title: "Coordinate Systems"
---

This chapter collects the current coordinate-system and placement language for
OPALX. It is assembled from the older LaTeX note in
`opalx/PhysicsManual/opalx-elemts-and-frames/opalx_element_placement.tex`,
specifically its section 1, section 5, and Appendix A.

{{< include _quick-reader.qmd >}}

{{< include _design-principles.qmd >}}

{{< include _geometric-background.qmd >}}
